center.name: 卡克塔省
center.summary: 卡克塔省是图谱中的地点节点，当前关联8种鸟类，包括Plain-crested elaenia、Grey-bellied antbird、Fulvous antshrike等8种鸟类，主要用于表示这些物种的分布地、停歇地或观测地。

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: obscura is found in the Eastern Andes of southern Colombia in the departments of Caquetá and Putumayo

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in southern Colombia's departments of Caquetá, Putumayo, and Amazonas; in the eastern half of Ecuador; and in northern Peru south at least to the Río Marañón and perhaps further to the rios Ucayali and Cushabatay. Though some maps show its range extending into far western Brazil, the SACC has no records from that country.Remsen, J

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It is found in Colombia in the south-central Caquetá Department and the far eastern Guainía and Vaupés departments

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: The nominate subspecies of the Imeri warbling antbird is found in southern Venezuela's Bolívar and Amazonas states, in Colombia from eastern Caquetá Department east through Vaupés and Guainía departments, and in extreme northwestern Brazil in the upper basin of the Rio Negro

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: It also occurs in isolated populations in Caquetá and Vaupés departments in southeastern Colombia, in Cuzco and Madre de Dios departments in southeastern Peru, in La Paz and Beni departments in northern Bolivia, and in Rondônia state in western Amazonian Brazil

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: sumaco: Eastern Andes of southern Colombia in Caquetá and Nariño departments and separately in Ecuador's Napo Province The streak-capped treehunter mostly inhabits montane evergreen forest in the subtropical zone, though it also occurs locally in secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: lateralis: southeastern Colombia from Caquetá Department south into extreme northeastern Peru east of the Rio Napo and east into Brazil north of the Amazon to the Rio Negro The white-cheeked antbird primarily inhabits humid lowland and foothill terra firme evergreen forest and nearby mature secondary forest

birds.label: 分布于
birds.evidence: caquetae is found adjoining the nominate's range in the southern Colombian departments of Putumayo and Caquetá
